calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Walls, Esq. 650-458-4041 of Ralls Grber & Niece for Petitioner Skanska USA Civil Plaintiff.
Stephen Litchfield 714-823-4100 of Collins Collins Muir & Stewart LLP for Respondent Tetra Tech through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Parties argue the interest rate on the arbitration award. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SKANSKA USA CIVIL WEST ROCKY MOUNTAIN DISTRICT INC's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Parties to meet and confer re: interest rate. If parties can't agree on the interest rate, they can both submit a letter to Judge Ulmer. Parties to submit an order and judgment that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
